---
title: ""
format:
  typst:
    papersize: a5
    mainfont: "GenRyuMin2 TW R"
    fontsize: 10pt
    margin:
      x: 22mm
      y: 24mm
    toc: false
lang: zh-TW
---

```{=typst}
// 章節資料由 scripts/build-toc.py 自動生成（來源：chapters.yml + book.pdf outline）
#import "_toc-data.typ": toc-parts

#set text(lang: "zh", region: "tw")
#set par(justify: true, leading: 0.8em, spacing: 0.9em)
#set page(numbering: "1")

#align(center)[
  #text(font: "GenRyuMin2 TW B", size: 22pt)[分子習慣]
  #v(0.4em)
  #text(size: 10pt, fill: luma(45%))[從原子再下一層——情境、神經、社會三層設計真正留得下來的習慣]
  #v(1em)
  #line(length: 40%, stroke: 0.5pt + luma(70%))
  #v(0.6em)
  #text(font: "GenRyuMin2 TW SB", size: 14pt)[目　次]
]

#v(1.2em)

// ── 樣式 helpers ─────────────────────────────

#let status-tag(status) = {
  if status == "pilot" {
    text(size: 8pt, fill: rgb("#2a7"))[pilot]
  } else if status == "drafted" {
    text(size: 8pt, fill: luma(55%))[drafted]
  } else {
    text(size: 8pt, fill: luma(65%))[planned]
  }
}

#let page-number(page) = {
  if page == none {
    text(size: 9pt, fill: luma(75%))[—]
  } else {
    text(size: 9.5pt, weight: "semibold", fill: luma(25%))[#page]
  }
}

#let part-header(name) = block(
  above: 1.4em,
  below: 0.6em,
  text(font: "GenRyuMin2 TW SB", size: 11pt, fill: luma(30%), name)
)

// 一列：編號、標題、leader dots、status tag、頁碼
#let chapter-row(num, title, status, page) = block(
  above: 0.5em,
  below: 0.15em,
  grid(
    columns: (2.4em, auto, 1fr, 3.4em, 1.8em),
    column-gutter: 0.6em,
    align: (right + horizon, left + horizon, center + horizon, right + horizon, right + horizon),
    text(weight: "bold")[#num],
    text(weight: "bold")[#title],
    box(width: 100%)[#repeat[#text(fill: luma(80%))[.]]],
    status-tag(status),
    page-number(page),
  )
)

#let chapter-subtitle(subtitle) = pad(
  top: 0em,
  bottom: 0.35em,
  left: 3em,
  right: 0.5em,
  text(size: 9pt, fill: luma(40%), subtitle),
)

// ── 展開目次 ─────────────────────────────────

#for part in toc-parts {
  part-header(part.name)
  for ch in part.chapters {
    chapter-row(ch.num, ch.title, ch.status, ch.page)
    chapter-subtitle(ch.subtitle)
  }
}

#v(1.2em)

#align(center)[
  #line(length: 40%, stroke: 0.5pt + luma(70%))
]

#v(0.5em)

#text(size: 8.5pt, fill: luma(45%))[
  *狀態標記*：
  #text(fill: rgb("#2a7"))[pilot] ＝ 本 release 已釋出並帶實際頁碼（數字由 PDF outline 自動抽取）；
  #text(fill: luma(55%))[drafted] ＝ 初稿完成待審；
  #text(fill: luma(65%))[planned] ＝ 結構已定、內容待寫。

  頁碼取自 `_book/book.pdf` outline（由 Typst 自動從各章 H1 生成，經 `mutool show outline` 抽出），保證和實際 PDF 一致。

  全書預計 280-320 頁（A5, 9pt）；所有學術引用於最終 release 前經 CrossRef API 驗證。
]
```
